summary: Valentine's/love letter app featuring an envelope animation that opens to reveal a letter, with a centered message box.
architectural_notes: The message box (envelope/letter container) must remain fixed at the center of the screen at all times and must not move or animate positionally.
known_issues: Message box drifts or moves off-center after the envelope opens animation plays.

existing_features.title: The letter/message panel revealed after the envelope opens must remain fixed and perfectly centered in the viewport at all times — it must not shift, drift, slide, or animate its position after the reveal. The panel's centering must be enforced with stable, non-animated positioning (e.g., fixed positioning with transform-based centering) so that no keyframe, state change, or re-render can cause it to move from the center of the screen.
